field.searchPlaceholder: Search by activity (e.g. hospital, textile, engineering)...
field.criticalCodeNote: The red color represents critical code

agriculture.title: Agriculture, Forestry & Fishing
agriculture.description: Includes agricultural production, forestry and fishing activities.

food.title: Food
food.description: Includes activities associated with agricultural production, food processing and hospitality services.

mechanicalIndustries.title: Mechanical industries
mechanicalIndustries.description: Includes heavy industries, equipment manufacturing, metal products, and transportation.

paperAndPrinting.title: Paper and printing
paperAndPrinting.description: Includes paper production, publishing and commercial printing activities.

metalsAndBuildingMaterials.title: Metals and building materials
metalsAndBuildingMaterials.description: Includes mineral extraction and manufacturing of basic building materials.

constructionAndBuilding.title: Construction and building
constructionAndBuilding.description: Includes implementation of construction projects and associated engineering services.

industrialProduction.title: Industrial production
industrialProduction.description: Includes manufacturing industries and the production of consumer and industrial goods.

chemicalIndustries.title: Chemical industries
chemicalIndustries.description: Includes industries based on chemical processing and production of industrial materials.

energySupplies.title: Energy supplies and utilities
energySupplies.description: Includes energy and water production and distribution services.

transportationAndWaste.title: Transportation and waste management
transportationAndWaste.description: Services include transportation, logistics and waste management.

services.title: Services
services.description: Includes service, commercial, technical and educational activities.

nuclearSector.title: Nuclear sector
nuclearSector.description: Includes activities associated with the production and processing of nuclear fuel.

pharmaceuticalSector.title: Pharmaceutical sector
pharmaceuticalSector.description: Includes manufacturing pharmaceuticals and medical products.

aviationAndSpace.title: Aviation and space
aviationAndSpace.description: Includes the design, manufacture and maintenance of aircraft, spacecraft and associated systems.

healthSector.title: Health sector
healthSector.description: Includes health care services and activities associated with social support.

iafCodes.petroleum: Manufacture of coke and refined petroleum products
iafCodes.basicMetals: Basic metals and fabricated metal products
iafCodes.wholesale: Wholesale and retail trade; repair of motor vehicles, motorcycles and personal and household goods

documents.requiredSubtitle: Please attach all mandatory documents shown below to complete the certification procedures.
documents.guideline1: All documents must be valid and very clear.
documents.guideline2: It is allowed to upload more than one file for each item (in PDF, JPG, PNG formats) with a maximum file size of 10 MB.
documents.guideline3: The HACCP plans item is automatically activated when selecting food safety standards.

items.documentarySystem: The facility's documentary system (list of documents and records)
items.commercialRegistry: A copy of the commercial registry/establishment license
items.brandImageNote: If the mark differs from the name mentioned in the commercial registry, please send the intellectual property certificate.

feedback.pageSubtitle: You can receive and respond to comments from here
feedback.reviewerMessage:
Greetings,
Please kindly amend the name of the entity's representative in the establishment file to match the updated data in the latest commercial register, as the current name is old.
feedback.applicantMessage: The name has been successfully updated as required by the commercial registry. Please review the updated data and let us know the next steps.
feedback.replyPlaceholder: Write your response or inquiry here...

scope.scopeOfWork: The scope of work of the organization according to the commercial registration / license
scope.economicField: The economic field of activity of the enterprise
scope.productsServicesNature: The nature of the products / services provided by the establishment :
scope.annualProductionCapacity: Annual production capacity of the organization :
scope.branchEmployees: No. of employees in the branch
scope.auditScopeEmployees: No. of employees within the scope of the audit
scope.firstPhaseDate: What is the expected date for implementation?
scope.integratedSystem: Is the management system implemented common? (Integrated)
scope.centralAdministration: Is the branch affiliated with the central administration?

consulting.title: Consultation and qualification data
consulting.qualifiedByConsultant: Has the organization been qualified by one of the consulting bodies?
consulting.consultantName: If yes, please mention the name of the entity.
consulting.consultantNamePlaceholder: Enter the name of the consulting body
consulting.cvAttached: Has the CV and profile of the eligible company been attached to the application for the management systems certificate?
consulting.consultationPeriod: How long is the consultation period in months?
consulting.consultantRating: On a scale of one to ten, what do you rate for the consultant or consultant?
consulting.recommendationRating: On a scale from one to ten, would you recommend this to the consultant or advisor to others in your network?
consulting.ratingNote: Note: 1 represents the lowest rating, and 10 represents the highest rating.

readiness.title: Readiness of the management system and work sites
readiness.systemLanguage: The language in which the management system was set up
readiness.safetyProcedures: Availability of safety procedures at the audit site for members of the audit team.
readiness.subcontracting: Does the organization carry out any activities through subcontracting?
readiness.previousGrants: Has the organization ever obtained grants from another party before?
readiness.otherSpecification: If there is another specification, please mention it
readiness.designActivity: Is design one of the activities of the organization ?
readiness.designExceptionReason: In case of answering "No," please provide the reason for the exception

iso50001.energyConsumers: What are the processes / services / products / equipment that consume the largest percentage of energy in the facility?
iso50001.enpi: What Energy Performance Indicators (EnPIs) are used to measure and improve energy efficiency?
iso50001.energyBaseline: Has an energy baseline been established?
iso50001.baselineUpdated: If yes, when was it last updated?
iso50001.monitoringTools: What tools or systems are used to monitor and analyze energy consumption?

iso45001.ohsSystemInPlace: Is there currently an occupational health and safety management system in place?
iso45001.ohsStartDate: What is the start date of implementing the current occupational health and safety management system?
iso45001.risksIdentified: Have all risks related to operational activities been identified?
iso45001.criticalRisks: Please specify the critical occupational health and safety risks that have been identified
iso45001.internalAudits: Have any internal audits of the system been conducted?
iso45001.complianceLaws: What are the local and regional laws and regulations that the organization complies with regarding occupational health and safety?
iso45001.legalViolations: Have there ever been any legal violations or fines related to occupational safety and health?
iso45001.ohsCertification: Has the organization obtained ISO 45001 certification or any other occupational health and safety-related certifications?
iso45001.certifyingBody: If yes, what is the name of the certifying body?

legal.sectionOneTitle: Section One: Application for Certification of the Management System:
legal.certificateDataTitle: Data as it will appear on the certificate
legal.applicationBody: We, [Name of the Entity], wish to obtain a certificate / certificates for the [Name of the Standard] management system(s) through your company. We hereby confirm that the information provided in this application and the attached documents is accurate.
legal.confidentialityIntro: [CB Name] employees and auditors commit to maintaining the confidentiality and not using or disclosing to any third party any information obtained from the client during the performance of certification services, except in the following cases:
legal.confidentialityItem1: Any information that CB Name had prior to the client providing it.
legal.confidentialityItem2: Any information that is public or will legally enter the public domain, or that the company obtained from an independent source other than the client.
legal.confidentialityItem3: Any information that may be required to be disclosed to any court or financial or regulatory authority
legal.certificateNameAr: The name as it will appear on the accreditation certificate in Arabic
legal.certificateNameArPlaceholder: Example: Standard Arabia Company for Commercial Services
legal.certificateNameEn: Name as it will appear on the accreditation certificate in English
legal.certificateAddressAr: The address as it will appear on the accreditation certificate in Arabic
legal.certificateAddressEn: The address as it will appear on the accreditation certificate in English
legal.certificateFieldAr: The field as it will appear on the accreditation certificate in Arabic
legal.certificateFieldEn: The field as it will appear on the accreditation certificate in English
legal.submissionWarning: The order cannot be modified after submission. Please be sure to review all data and attachments before final submission.
legal.acknowledgement: I acknowledge that I have read, understood and agree to all of the above and confirm that I have reviewed all the data and wish to submit the application

form.otherStandard: In case of others standard not listed, please specify it.
form.productionLinesActive: Are all production lines or processes within the product range active?
form.representativeNamePlaceholder: Type the full name of the facility representative
form.mainActivityPlaceholder: Enter the main activity of the facility

approved.title: The Request Has Been Approved
approved.subtitle: Thank you, please wait for updates.

underReview.title: The Application Is Currently Under Technical Review
underReview.subtitle: The review team is examining your application. The status will be updated and you will be notified once the final decision is issued. Thank you.

rejected.title: Your request has been rejected
rejected.subtitle: We apologize that your file has not passed the technical review stage.
rejected.fileTitle: File explaining the reasons for rejection

commercialExpired.title: The commercial registration file has been completed
commercialExpired.description: During the audit, it was found that the commercial register had expired on 12/27/2025 Please upload a more recent file.

nonCompliance.title: Non-compliance with conditions  (ISO 50001)
nonCompliance.description: The scope of work was not explained in detail and is one of the requirements for accreditation

rejected.correctionSubtitle:
You can amend the requirements, upload new documents, and apply directly again.
Without the need to open a new application.
rejected.downloadReport: Download the full report of the rejection file
rejected.helpText: Do you need help understanding the technical terms?

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a verification code
forgotPassword.otpSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email
forgotPassword.verifySubtitle: Please enter the verification code sent to your email
forgotPassword.resetSubtitle: Create a new password for your account
forgotPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset. You can now log in with your new password.
forgotPassword.failureDescription: We couldn't reset your password. Please try again or contact support if the problem continues.
